run_commands: cd projects/pipeline-runner && npm test 2>&1 && node --test tests/validation.test.js 2>&1
summary: Implemented strict validation layer for work_3 in allowed paths. Added src/validation module (timeline consistency checks, WAV duration extraction, ffprobe audio-stream validation, and validatePipelineArtifacts report writer), exported validation API from src/index.js, and extended workspace artifact mapping with final_video. Added tests/validation.test.js that inject invalid fixtures and verifies pipeline validation fails for duration mismatch, segment-count mismatch, and multiple final-video audio streams, while passing for valid fixtures. Validation command passed with all tests green.
